rationale: No direct conflict. Reduced tax base from higher homestead exemption may indirectly affect district revenue for stadium contracts, but §45.156(c) allows maintenance tax 'in an amount sufficient, without limitation,' so rate can adjust.
quote: an annual maintenance tax in an amount sufficient, without limitation, to provide all or part of the consideration
_note: Any impact is fiscal/indirect rather than a legal conflict with operative text of §45.156.
